title: current_assets_index contains mixed legacy entry shapes
description: The index mixes full asset records with older phase-report entries that only expose path/type/date/created fields, so the file is consistent enough for current lookup but not fully schema-unified.
evidence: Entry at index 105 lacks asset_id and uses the legacy path/type/date/created shape.
recommended_fix: Run a dedicated registry normalization pass that converts legacy entries to the current asset schema or moves them into a separate phase-report registry.

title: auth_refresh_result.json is a tracked volatile runtime snapshot
description: The file changes on every auth refresh and dirties the repo unless it is explicitly restored or intentionally committed.
evidence: This cleanup pass had to restore the file byte-exact after prior auth runs to return the repo to a clean working state.
recommended_fix: Decide whether auth_refresh_result.json should remain tracked evidence or be moved to a generated/ignored artifact path with docs updated accordingly.

title: Non-Stage-1 extra slices were removed instead of integrated
description: Ad hoc post-Stage-1 outputs for 2025-03-05, 2026-03-18, and reports-summary work were removed from the working tree because they were not integrated into current registries or docs.
evidence: 40 untracked files were classified as generated noise and removed during this cleanup.
recommended_fix: If any of those slices are still needed, reintroduce them through a dedicated package pass with registry/docs updates instead of leaving them as untracked drift.
